title: Role-Based Access Control: How to Build an RBAC App with AI
summary: YouTube tutorial demonstrating how to build a role-based access control event management app using Softr's AI Co-Builder. The video compares Softr with Lovable and Replit, highlighting automated database generation, workflow automations, and cost-efficiency for no-code app development without requiring multiple AI prompts.
